short: The company behind Stable Diffusion, an open family of text-to-image models.
definition: Stability AI is an AI company best known for releasing Stable Diffusion, the open-weight latent diffusion model that made high-quality text-to-image generation widely accessible and spawned a huge ecosystem of fine-tunes and tools. It also develops open models for audio, video, and 3D. The company has seen significant restructuring but continues to ship open generative models.
